items.name_en: Top Quality Original【Exclusive Photo M12664 Green 】This card case features a slim silhouette constructed from Monogram Heritage canvas, easily fitting into pockets or handbags. The flap is secured by a hidden snap button, revealing a fan-fold compartment and card slots. Calfskin lining and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo inspired by Damier canvas add refined details. 8 x 1 x 10.5 cm (H x W x L)

items.name_en: Top Quality Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Clea Wallet】 M12188 Pearl Light Blue (Embossed)
items.name_cn:
Top Quality Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Clea Wallet】 M12188 Pearl Light Blue (Embossed)
A "Wallet-Claire" from the "LV SKI" series with added luster. The exclusive Azure Frost of the season creates a sophisticated atmosphere. Made with Monogram Amplant leather, symbolizing the Maison, and decorated with a Monogram flower charm on the zipper. The compact design includes a zippered coin pocket and 6 card slots for easy organization.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 3.5 cm

items.name_en: Top Quality Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Lisa Wallet】M12536 Pearl Light Blue (Embossed)
items.name_cn:
Top Quality Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Lisa Wallet】M12536 Pearl Light Blue (Embossed)
This Lisa wallet is crafted from iconic Monogram Empreinte leather with a "shiny" effect, perfect for the party season. Its compact design easily slides into small bags or clutches, with a letter combination flower charm on the zipper. Inside, it features multiple pockets for coins and bills, plus four card slots.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm

items.name_en: Top Quality Unreleased Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】M13085 White Pop (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top Quality Unreleased Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】M13085 White Pop (Takashi Murakami)
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 features the classic Monogram pattern in the vivid colors of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. The dazzling lock and corner reinforcements draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Dimensions: 25 x 19 x 15cm

specs.rawTitle:
Top Quality Unreleased Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】M13085 White Pop (Takashi Murakami)
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 features the classic Monogram pattern in the vivid colors of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. The dazzling lock and corner reinforcements draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Dimensions: 25 x 19 x 15cm

items.name_en: Top quality, Cotswolds Check Tote
items.name_cn:
Top quality, Cotswolds Check Tote
Crafted from grained calfskin leather, featuring Burberry check side panels and matching signature sand-colored lining. Exquisitely designed with ample interior space. Features check embossed closure and D-ring hardware inspired by the brand's iconic Trench coat belt. Can be carried by hand or worn over the shoulder using the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions 30.5 × 13 × 22.5cm

specs.rawTitle:
Top quality, Cotswolds Check Tote
Crafted from grained calfskin leather, featuring Burberry check side panels and matching signature sand-colored lining. Exquisitely designed with ample interior space. Features check embossed closure and D-ring hardware inspired by the brand's iconic Trench coat belt. Can be carried by hand or worn over the shoulder using the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions 30.5 × 13 × 22.5cm

items.name_en: Top Upgraded Version
items.name_cn:
Top Upgraded Version
Size: 21 x 11.5 x 4.5cm
Lady Dior Woc Handle Pearl Chain Bag, Spring/Summer New Arrival, crafted in patent leather with a woven pattern. The flap design features a D.I.O.R. charm for a touch of elegance. Practical with multiple compartments and card slots for daily essentials, it is an ideal companion for both day and evening wear. Equipped with a top handle and a detachable chain adorned with resin beads, it can be carried by hand or worn crossbody.

specs.rawTitle:
Top Upgraded Version
Size: 21 x 11.5 x 4.5cm
Lady Dior Woc Handle Pearl Chain Bag, Spring/Summer New Arrival, crafted in patent leather with a woven pattern. The flap design features a D.I.O.R. charm for a touch of elegance. Practical with multiple compartments and card slots for daily essentials, it is an ideal companion for both day and evening wear. Equipped with a top handle and a detachable chain adorned with resin beads, it can be carried by hand or worn crossbody.

items.name_en: Top-tier ✨【Alma BB Handbag】M53152 Multicolore
items.name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【Alma BB Handbag】M53152 Multicolore
M13078 Multicolore
As a tribute to the City of Light, Paris, the Monogram Multicolore series presents this Alma BB handbag. Monogram Multicolore canvas shapes an Art Deco silhouette, the Louis Vuitton Paris logo appears like a Paris street sign, and the central stripes reiterate classic brand elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm.

items.name_en: Top-tier ✨【HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag】M13084 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag】M13084 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series, featuring the artist's signature rainbow tones to depict the full Monogram pattern. The horizontal silhouette features smooth lines, a top handle, nail side strap, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch with calfskin details, while the refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

specs.rawTitle:
Top-tier ✨【HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag】M13084 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)

The horizontal silhouette features smooth lines, a top handle, nail side strap, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch with calfskin details, while the refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
